svg.title: Resizing an array by copying into new memory
svg.desc: Shows myArray = [0, 4, 7] stored at addresses $0, $4, $8. Because it's full, a new larger array is allocated at a different memory location (addresses $40 to $60), the old values are copied over plus a new value 9, and the old myArray is freed once the copy is complete.
svg.text: The original myArray is freed from memory once every element has been copied over.
